productDisplayName: SPYKAR Men Blue Slim Fit Jeans
description: A pair of blue 5-pocket mid-rise jeans, lightly washed and distressed, whiskers on the crotch, has a zip fly and button closure, waistband with belt loops, 2 scoop pockets with metal rivets on the front sides, a change pocket with branding on the right, 2 patch pockets with stitch detail on the back, brand patch on the back waistband
